name: Euclean: Automated Geometry Problem Formalization with Unified Verification in Lean
summary: arXiv:2607.19374v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent formal reasoning systems have reached IMO-level performance, yet they leave a fragmented landscape: algebra and number theory are handled in L...
description: arXiv:2607.19374v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent formal reasoning systems have reached IMO-level performance, yet they leave a fragmented landscape: algebra and number theory are handled in Lean, while geometry still relies on domain-specific languages with limited formal guarantees. This split increases the trusted computing base and hinders unified model development. Existing geometry-i...
author: Linbin Tang, Jingyan You, Zilin Kang, Hanzhang Liu, Sophia Zhang, Zenan Li, Chenrui Cao, Liangcheng Song, Jiaao Wu, Xian Zhang, Fan Yang
